name: Status-Based Filters
description: Filter graph nodes by workflow status and lifecycle stage

filters.name: Planning Stage
filters.description: Show items in planning or proposal stage

filters.name: In Progress
filters.description: Show active work items currently being developed
filters.useCase: Monitor current sprint and active development

filters.name: In Review
filters.description: Show items awaiting review or approval
filters.useCase: Track code reviews and approval workflows

filters.name: Testing/QA
filters.description: Show items in testing or quality assurance
filters.useCase: Monitor QA pipeline and test execution

filters.name: Completed
filters.description: Show completed work items (default: hidden to reduce clutter)

filters.name: Archived/Deprecated
filters.description: Show archived or deprecated content (default: hidden)
filters.useCase: Review legacy systems and migration candidates

filters.name: Cancelled/Rejected
filters.description: Show cancelled or rejected work items
filters.useCase: Review decision history and scope changes

standard: planning → in-progress → review → testing → complete → verified
blocked/waiting can occur at any stage
fastTrack: planning → in-progress → complete (skip review/testing for small changes)

in-progress.trigger: Code complete OR dependency issue OR direct to testing

review.trigger: Approval granted OR changes requested OR blocker found

testing.trigger: Tests pass OR bugs found OR dependency issue

complete.trigger: Deployed to production OR reopened for changes

verified.trigger: Feature stable in production for 30+ days

applyingFilters: Toggle status filters to focus on specific workflow stages
Hide 'complete' and 'archived' to see only active work
Show 'blocked' items prominently for daily standups

workflowViews.dailyStandup: Show: in-progress, blocked, review | Hide: complete, archived
workflowViews.sprintPlanning: Show: planning, in-progress | Hide: complete, archived, cancelled
workflowViews.releaseReadiness: Show: testing, verified | Hide: planning, cancelled
workflowViews.retrospective: Show: complete, cancelled | Hide: in-progress, planning
workflowViews.technicalDebt: Show: blocked, archived, deprecated | Hide: in-progress, complete

automationTips.autoStatusUpdate: Use Dataview to auto-tag status based on metadata fields
automationTips.reminderSystem: Create reminders for items in 'blocked' status > 7 days
